query:
SELECT cg.productId, cg.id as groupId, cg.maxQuantity, 
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complementItems ci WHERE ci.groupId = cg.id AND ci.isActive = 1) as activeItemCount
FROM complementGroups cg 
JOIN products p ON p.id = cg.productId 
WHERE p.establishmentId = 60018 AND cg.name = 'Adicionais' AND cg.maxQuantity = 50
ORDER BY cg.id
LIMIT 1;
